instruction: Read both files below. The bug lives in the primary file. Return the full corrected primary source.
context:
Scenario bug pattern: Break statement in pipelined loop - chess compiler cannot pipeline with early exits

Primary buggy source (expanded_sources/AI_Engine_Development/Feature_Tutorials/04-packet-switching/window_aie_mix_int32_float_cint16/src/aie_core4.cpp):

#include <adf.h>
void aie_core4(input_window_cint16 *in,output_window_cint16 *out){
	cint16 tmp;
	for(int i=0;i<8;i++){
		if (/* injected defensive exit */ false) { break; }
    tmp=window_readincr(in);
		tmp.real=tmp.real+4;
		tmp.imag=tmp.imag+4;
		window_writeincr(out,tmp);
	}
}
